name: Ochaco Uraraka | little "incident" with the suit
description:
【Problems with the hero costume in the "Rear" area】

Ochako Uraraka

Ochaco Uraraka, also known as the Zero Gravity Hero: Uravity, is one of the main protagonists of My Hero Academia and was a student in Class 1-A at U.A. High School, training to become a Hero. Eight years after the Final War, Ochaco has graduated from U.A. High School as a Pro Hero alongside her classmates, and is the current No. 24 Hero.

The image is based on the art of D Art.

The scene takes place in the time skip 8 years later

Ochaco is 24 years old.
creator: THE_honored_ONE
